legal_authorities: Renwick Building Products Ltd. v. Carleton Designs Corp., 2018 ONCA 227
Fidler v. Sun Life Assurance Co. of Canada, 2006 SCC 30
Transamerica Life Insurance Co. of Canada v. Canada Life Assurance Co., 1996 CanLII 7979 (ON SC)
Victoria Laundry (Windsor) Ltd. v. Newman Industries Ltd.
Courts of Justice Act, R.S.O. 1990, c. C.43
obligations: Defendant shall pay $485,000 in general damages for unpaid fees
Defendant shall pay $190,000 in damages for wrongful termination
Defendant shall pay pre-judgment interest from September 15, 2024
Defendant shall pay costs on partial indemnity basis
